pr.title: Non-record: 6-Technique Stack — Catalytic Residuals + Value Residual + Gated Attention + BigramHash(10240) + 12L (val_bpb=1.1690)

output.summary: Stacks catalytic/value residuals and gated attention with BigramHash embeddings in a 12-layer 3×MLP transformer to fit the 16MB int6 budget.
techniques: Catalytic/value residuals plus gated attention in a 12-layer 3×MLP stack
BigramHash(10240) embeddings to boost context modeling within budget
Muon WD + SWA + late QAT int6+zstd compression pipeline
